summary: Completed comprehensive testing of MAVR athlete OS. Backend APIs working excellently (95.7% success rate), frontend loading properly with MAVR branding, user registration/login flows functional, dashboard interface working with all major components.

ui_bugs.issue: Some navigation items (Workout, Check-in, Progression, Event Mode) not found with expected data-testid attributes
Admin navigation not found with data-testid='nav-admin'
Logout button not found with expected data-testid='logout-btn'

passed_tests: Onboarding system with profile saving and plan generation
Dashboard data retrieval with all components
Frontend landing page with MAVR branding and black/red theme
Dashboard interface with all 7 major cards (Readiness, Streak, Consistency, Checklist, Macros, Workout, Diet)
Diet plan page navigation and display
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix weekly reports endpoint (500 error) and add missing data-testid attributes to navigation elements for better testability. All core functionality is working well.
